data.title: Aster: The second phase of the airdrop inspection page will be online at 21:00 today
data.description: According to an official announcement, Aster announced that the Phase 2 airdrop check page will be live at 9:00 PM today. Previously, Aster announced that it has added more flexibility for users to claim Genesis Phase 2 (S2) rewards: Option 1: Receive the ASTER airdrop as usual. Option 2: Full refund of S2 transaction fees. This will be treated as a zero-fee transaction.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 121,000 USDT with a 0.51% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 10, 2025, 02:54 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 121,000 USDT and is now trading at 120,960.890625 USDT, with a narrowed 0.51% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Fed's Daly: After the September rate cut, policy remains moderately tight
data.description: Fed Chairwoman Daly stated: "After the September rate cut, policy remains moderately tight. The Fed also expects to implement more rate cuts as part of its risk management strategy."

data.title: Aethir Launches Aethir RWA Capital, Backed by Tactical Compute and Other Institutions
data.description: Aethir, a decentralized GPU cloud network, announced the launch of Aethir RWA Capital. Backed by institutional and DeFi partners including Tactical Compute, Credit Coop, and StoryHunt, Aethir aims to bridge the gap between traditional credit infrastructure and decentralized staking mechanisms. The Aethir RWA Capital suite includes two core products: 1. RWA Equity Capital, which supports staking financing using staked, unvested, or liquid ATH tokens and expected GPU cash flows; and 2. RWA Liquidity Capital, a community-backed, cash flow-based financing using expected GPU rewards.

data.title: Binance Announces Walrus (WAL) HODLer Airdrop and Upcoming Listing
data.description: Binance has revealed the 50th project on the HODLer Airdrops page Walrus (WAL). Users who subscribed their BNB to Simple Earn (Flexible and/or Locked) and/or On-Chain Yields products from 2025-10-01 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-03 23:59 (UTC) will get the airdrops distribution. The HODLer Airdrops information is estimated to be available in 24 hours, and the new token will be distributed to users’ Spot Accounts at least 1 hour before trading starts.Binance will then list WAL at 2025-10-10 07:30 (UTC) and open trading against USDT, USDC, BNB, FDUSD, and TRY pairs. The seed tag will be applied to WAL.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences Significant Liquidations
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $594 million over the past 24 hours. Long positions accounted for $439 million of these liquidations, while short positions made up $155 million. Ethereum saw liquidations amounting to $160 million, and Bitcoin experienced $164 million in liquidations.

data.title: Tom Lee's fund analyst: Ethereum is expected to end its correction tomorrow and may fall to $4,200
data.description: This morning, Tom Lee retweeted Mark Newton, an analyst at his fund, regarding Ethereum's latest outlook. Mark Newton believes the recent crypto market pullback is nothing to worry about, predicting Ethereum will bottom out within the next 1-2 days before rebounding to $5,500. From September 25th to October 7th, ETH experienced a strong technical rally, followed by only a minor three-wave pullback. The correction is expected to end before October 11th, with a resumption of the upward trend. "ETH has now retraced 50% of its recent gains, but may continue to fall to the $4200-4220 area, which will be an excellent support area, after which ETH will turn around and rise again." It should be noted that although Mark Newton had made accurate predictions about Ethereum's trend many times before, on September 16, Mark Newton said, "ETH is not expected to fall below the previous low of $4233. It may fall back to $4418 or $4375 this weekend. We will use this weak market to buy on dips. ETH is expected to rise to $5500 before mid-October." But then Ethereum briefly plunged to $4054.

data.title: SunPump now supports Chinese Meme issuance and trading
data.description: According to official news, the SunPump platform now officially supports the issuance and trading of Chinese memes. This update means that Chinese creators can also conveniently create, issue, and trade meme tokens centered on Chinese narratives on SunPump, further expanding the diverse expression of meme culture.

data.title: Bitmine Withdraws Significant Ethereum Amount from BitGo
data.description: According to TechFlow, on October 10, blockchain analysis platform Lookonchain reported that Bitmine has withdrawn 23,823 Ethereum (ETH) from BitGo, valued at approximately $103.68 million. This transaction occurred five hours prior to the report. The movement of such a substantial amount of ETH has drawn attention within the cryptocurrency community.

data.title: Several US Democratic senators have proposed anti-DeFi proposals to restrict high-risk protocols
data.description: Cointelegraph reported that several US Democratic senators have introduced a bill opposing DeFi, which would allow the Treasury Department to place "high-risk" DeFi protocols on a "restricted list" and impose penalties on US users who generate recurring income from using these protocols. The bill would also require Know Your Customer (KYC) regulations for crypto front-ends, such as non-custodial wallets, and remove legal protections for crypto developers. Both the Chamber of Digital Commerce and the US Blockchain Association warned that such measures would hinder innovation and potentially drive the industry overseas.

data.title: Delphi Digital analyst: Total 3 may see a breakthrough in its four-year range
data.description: Delphi Digital posted on the X platform that its market analyst @that1618 guy pointed out that Total 3 (the total market capitalization of cryptocurrencies excluding BTC and ETH) may see a breakthrough in the four-year range, and said that when a certain target breaks through the structure after four years, it may usher in the next round of market.

data.title: The meme coin "Xiuxian" based on He Yichangwen was launched 4 hours ago, and its market value exceeded 32 million US dollars.
data.description: This morning, He Yi published a lengthy article titled "Come! Let's Cultivate Immortality Together!" on Binance Square, detailing his views on crypto projects and crypto memes, and the evolution of his perspectives. According to GMGN data, the meme coin "Xiu Xian," inspired by He Yi's article, surpassed $32 million in market capitalization and reached $105.7 million in trading volume within four hours of its launch. It currently ranks first on the Binance Meme Rush leaderboard.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin, XRP Fall Amid Government Shutdown Uncertainty: Analytics Firm Says BTC Needs To Hold This Level In Short Term
data.description:
Leading cryptocurrencies fell alongside stocks on Thursday, as investors reduced their risk appetite amid the government shutdown.

data.title: Crypto Industry Faces Hiring Challenges Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, securing a job in the crypto industry has become increasingly challenging for less-experienced candidates in 2025. A recent survey by venture capital firm Dragonfly Capital reveals that only one in ten crypto roles are at the entry level. This trend is attributed to a surge in failed crypto projects, which has influenced hiring practices. The report, based on data from 85 crypto companies and approximately 3,400 employee and candidate data points collected in late 2024 and early 2025, highlights that senior and principal-level positions make up 37% of the industry's roles. Engineering remains the dominant function, accounting for 67% of the total headcount.

Crypto hiring has been described as "cautious" this year, despite a bullish market, positive sentiment, and a pro-crypto administration under U.S. President Donald Trump. Dragonfly Capital notes that net hiring turned negative in the first half of 2025, with significant job growth in January followed by a tariff shock in February and substantial job cuts in March. Entry-level employees have been most affected, facing lower salaries and reduced token packages, although these were partly offset by higher equity. This cautious approach to hiring comes as a surprise given the strong appeal of crypto among younger generations, with 34% of global crypto holders aged between 24 and 35 as of December 2024, according to crypto payment company Triple-A.

Kevin Gibson, founder of recruitment firm Proof of Search, observes that many seasoned crypto professionals are re-entering the job market following the failure of several projects after their token generation events. This influx of experienced candidates provides hiring companies with a pool of seasoned talent to choose from. Gibson notes that firms are focusing on hiring senior talent to accelerate project delivery, anticipating a strong market for at least another six months. However, the recruitment landscape has not returned to the levels seen in 2021, when entry-level candidates with minimal experience were quickly hired.

Matt Thompson, founder of TRB Executive Search, explains that crypto companies tend to increase hiring during favorable market conditions but resort to layoffs during downturns. He warns that the industry's volatility may deter younger candidates from pursuing careers in crypto, as traditional banking offers more assured career longevity. This instability could impact the long-term interest of students in entering the crypto sector.

data.title: A whale deposited another 14,200 ETH into Binance, with a total profit exceeding $156 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, whale 0x882E just deposited another 14,275 ETH to Binance. Two years ago, he purchased and staked 64,400 ETH at $1,882. His total floating profit is estimated to be $156 million.

data.title: Coinbase and Mastercard plan to acquire stablecoin startup BVNK for approximately $2 billion
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, citing Fortune magazine, Coinbase and Mastercard are in talks to acquire stablecoin startup BVNK for approximately $2 billion, with Coinbase reportedly in a leading position in the negotiations.

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin OG, who made a high-profile Ethereum swap, may be linked to Trend Research under Yi Lihua
data.description: According to Lookonchain analysis, Bitcoin OG, which has been frequently swapping Ethereum positions, may be connected to Trend Research, a subsidiary of Yi Lihua. Evidence suggests that wallet 0x52d3 sent 0.1 ETH as gas fees to this Bitcoin OG eight hours ago, and subsequently deposited 1.31 million USDC into Trend Research's Binance address. According to today's news, this Bitcoin OG has increased its short position to 3,600 BTC (US$438 million), resulting in a current loss of US$3.66 million. The liquidation price was US$139,900.

data.title: Aave and Blockdaemon partner to boost institutional access to DeFi services
data.description: Blockdaemon, a leading institutional staking service, and Aave Labs, a core contributor to the Aave protocol, have entered into a strategic partnership to expand institutional access to decentralized finance (DeFi) opportunities. Aave Labs and Blockdaemon are committed to providing institutional-grade access to the Aave DeFi market, leveraging Blockdaemon's Earn Stack and Aave Vaults to achieve this goal.
